center.name: Northern Mexico
center.summary: Northern Mexico是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿头鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: T.|last2=Namgail|first2=Tsewang|date=6 April 2017|publisher=Cambridge University Press|isbn=978-1-107-11471-5|language=en}} Japan, and South Korea. Also in the east, it ranges to south-eastern and south-western Australia and New Zealand in the Southern Hemisphere. It is strongly migratory in the northern parts of its breeding range, and winters farther south. For example, in North America, it winters south to the southern United States and northern Mexico,{{Cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=ILrZ4fhHnGcC|title=Final environmental statement for the issuance of annual regulations permitting the sport hunting of migratory birds|last=Service|first=U
